name: detect-picker-owns-input-state4-after-submitting-numbered-list
comment: Real captured state (screens.json, label 4-after-submitting-numbered-list). The submitted '❯ 1. Reply with only the word alpha' stays in scrollback forever; the live input row below it (where the cursor now sits) is back to bare. Getting this wrong is the catastrophic case the lines-only predicate produced: every later sendPrompt from a user who ever sent a numbered list would be refused, permanently.

lines: ❯ 1. Reply with only the word alpha
